description: Two fragmentary legal documents on both sides of the fragment. Recto is dated "[14]96 Seleucid which equals to the month of Ṣafar [5]81 AH", which is May 1185 CE. Signed: Menashshe b. Yosef, Elʿazar ha-Kohen b. Shemarya, and Shelomo b. Natan. Verso is another deed, probably dealing with a lease of an apartment, signed in Fustat by "Shemu'el ha-Levi b.[Se'adya]", a known judge and scribe in the late 12th century.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
